narrative:
Jackson Township has 1,619 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.5 percentage points.
